label: Write Single Values
info:
Write tests for all scalar datatypes in plc/s7-1500.
For every datatype there is one s7-plus write node plus one inject per
constant defined in the matching DB; each inject writes that constant
value into the *_write symbol.
Below each write group a read-back row (trigger inject + s7-plus read +
debug) reads the same *_write tag back from the PLC for verification.
Hardware and system datatypes are intentionally excluded.

name: Write single values — every plc/s7-1500 scalar constant
